content.problemStatement:
Write a C++ program that outputs the following message exactly as shown:

`I 
love 
CodeChef
`
content.outputFormat:
Print the three words exactly as shown, each on its own line:
I
love
CodeChef

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required three lines.
No input is needed; the output is fixed.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints the three required lines in the given order. No input is read, and the output is constant, so the solution runs in O(1) time and O(1) extra space.

code.Java:
import java.io.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();sb.append("I
");sb.append("love
");sb.append("CodeChef
");System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
